chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP D 549 2025 _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.3674/2025. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on CMA No.2924/2025. 4. For orders on CMA No.2925/2025. 5. For hearing of main case. 20.02.2025 Mr. Qaim Ali Memon, advocate for the petitioners. 1. Urgency granted. 2 to 5. Petitioners have impugned order dated 27.11.2024, issued by the Government of Sindh, Industries & Commerce Department, whereby an administrator has been appointed pursuant to the inquiry proceedings. Upon being confronted as to jurisdictional defect and/or manifest infirmity meriting interference in writ jurisdiction, counsel remains unable to assist. No case is made out to entertain this matter in writ jurisdiction. In view hereof, petition is dismissed in limine alongwith pending applications/s. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
